recommendations.title: Prey for the Devil
recommendations.overview: In response to a global rise in demonic possessions, the Catholic Church reopens exorcism schools to train priests in the Rite of Exorcism. On this spiritual battlefield, an unlikely warrior rises: a young nun, Sister Ann. Thrust onto the spiritual f

recommendations.title: The Hallow
recommendations.overview: Deep within the darkness of secluded forest land in rural Ireland dwells an ancient evil. Feared by the nearby superstitious villagers as cursed creatures who prey upon the lost, their secrets have been kept from civilization and remain on their hall

recommendations.title: Night of the Animated Dead
recommendations.overview: An animated retelling of ‘Night of the Living Dead’, in which a group of people in a rural farmhouse struggle to survive the threat of bloodthirsty zombies.

recommendations.title: Ava's Possessions
recommendations.overview: Ava is recovering from demonic possession. With no memory of the past month, she must attend a Spirit Possessions Anonymous support group to figure out what happened. Ava's life was hijacked by a demon, now it's time to get it back.

recommendations.title: The House at the End of Time
recommendations.overview: The story of Dulce, a mother who has encounters with apparitions inside her old house. She must decipher a mystery that could trigger a prophecy: the death of her family.

recommendations.title: Storm Warning
recommendations.overview: A couple becomes lost in a massive storm and seek refuge at a nearby farmhouse, only to be captured by deranged killers.

recommendations.title: Here Alone
recommendations.overview: A woman struggles to survive on her own in the wake of a mysterious epidemic, which has decimated society and forced her deep into the unforgiving wild.

recommendations.title: Late Phases
recommendations.overview: When deadly attacks from a nearby forest beset a secluded retirement community, it is up to a blind army veteran to discover what the residents are hiding.

recommendations.title: Abandoned
recommendations.overview: After a young couple moves into a remote farmhouse with their infant son, the woman's struggles with postpartum psychosis begin to intensify... as the house reveals secrets of its own.

recommendations.title: Little Bone Lodge
recommendations.overview: During a stormy night in the Scottish Highlands, two criminal brothers on the run seek refuge in a desolate farmhouse. But after taking the resident family captive, they find the house holds even darker secrets of its own.
